combination.rule: Bliss independence using each drug's repository PKModel/PDModel

conditions.full: ADCascade + patient APOE4/A-beta heterogeneity + repository PK/PD
conditions.no_patient_heterogeneity: Trial-level only: baseline_abeta flattened; this is not a tissue-spatial ablation
conditions.no_inflammation: ADCascade state.nfkb reset to 0 and microglia_state reset to M0 after each step
conditions.no_pkpd: Combined repository PK/PD effect set to zero; cascade and heterogeneity retained

spatial_separation: The trial simulator does not call layer1_tissue; tissue spatial ablation is reported by grid_convergence.py outputs.
